data.title: Commerce Secretary Lutnick walks back tariff relief on electronics
data.description:
Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick walked back the recent reciprocal tariff exemption on select electronics announced in an April 12 bulletin from the United States Customs and Border Protection. On April 13, Lutnick told ABC News that the reciprocal tariff exemption was temporary until the administration established a sector tariff regime for semiconductor products, which includes phones, graphics processors, and computing chips in a "month or two. " Lutnick added:"President Trump has called out pharmaceuticals, semiconductors, and autos. He called them sector tariffs, and those are not available for negotiation
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/commerce-secretary-lutnick-walks-back-tariff-relief-electronics?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fartcoin ‘Hot Air’ Rises — $1.50 Just A Whiff Away
data.description:
One of the most intriguing cryptocurrencies, Fartcoin (FART), has made surprising gains as a spate of market turbulence in April 2025 reached new heights. The meme token, trading at $0. 83 when this report was made, surged 84% in the last week, elevating it into the spotlight of investors as global markets writhed in turmoil and tensions between the United States and China reached new highs. Related Reading: Bitcoin Maxi Takes Aim: Ethereum’s True Value? Lower Than You Think Price Nears Critical $1 Milestone Market statistics suggest that Fartcoin is trading under $1 but is testing key resistance levels
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/meme-coins/fartcoin-hot-air-rises-1-50-just-a-whiff-away/

data.title: Warren Buffett will only start buying up stocks again if the Fed intervenes in the market
data.description:
Warren Buffett, CEO of Berkshire Hathaway and the world’s most successful investor, is currently sitting on $334 billion in cash and history tells us he’s probably not gonna spend any of it on new stock positions unless the Federal Reserve jumps in and stabilizes the market. The Oracle of Omaha hasn’t made any major deals […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffett-waiting-for-the-fed/

data.title: Bitcoin rallies amid macroeconomic concerns — Are HYPE, ONDO, RNDR and KAS next?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) made a brilliant comeback this week, rising more than 7%, indicating solid buying at lower levels. BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes said in a post on X that the US bond market crisis could be setting the stage for more policy response, and that could result in an “up only mode” for Bitcoin. Blockchain and intelligence platform Glassnode said in a post on X that Bitcoin had built solid support at $79,000, with roughly 40,000 Bitcoin accumulated there. Bollinger Bands creator John Bollinger also echoed similar views
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-rallies-amid-macroeconomic-concerns-are-hype-ondo-rndr-and-kas-next?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: What Happened In Crypto Today: BTC, Alts, Market Overview
data.description:
